title: Multi AI Agent Systems: When One AI Brain Isn’t Enough
summary: IBM Technology explains how multi-agent systems address AI hallucinations by using multiple agents to improve trust and verification in AI systems. The approach enables safer, more reliable AI deployment in high-stakes settings where single-agent systems may produce confident but incorrect outputs.
